_comment_top: Starter config for @whitespace/pi-minimal-toolcall. Copy to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/pi-minimal-toolcall/config.json (or $PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR/extensions/pi-minimal-toolcall/config.json) and edit. Keys prefixed with `_` are ignored by the loader.
_comment_calm: Tool-call-scope defaults. Toggle to taste; changes take effect on the next /reload.
_comment_ownership: Per-builtin tool ownership flags. Set any to false to let another extension own that tool instead. Built-in names: read, grep, find, ls, bash, edit, write.
_comment_batchTools: Enable the batch tools read_files / edit_files / grep_files / find_files (groups multiple built-in calls into one block).
_comment_grouping: Grouping mode: "proximity" (default — any tool call joins the current group until text/thinking separates them), "consecutive" (old behavior — same tool name consecutive), or "none" (every call its own row).
_comment_expand: Max lines in the expanded body before tail-capping. Default 200. Set to 0 to disable the cap (not recommended).
_comment_spinner: Spinner cadence and frame sequence. intervalMs is clamped to 20-2000.
_comment_summary: How the latest arg shows on the collapsed summary. "single-only" (default) shows the arg for single-tool groups; "always" shows it for every group; "never" drops it.
_comment_write: How a write call renders in the expanded view. "content" (default) shows the full written file; "summary" shows the native status line; "both" shows both.
_comment_diff: Toggle the aggregated +N -M diff suffix on the collapsed line and the per-tool ✗ error mark.
_comment_custom: Opt-in rendering for non-builtin extension tools. Add a tool's exact name (must not be one of the 7 builtins). Each entry: { enabled: bool, outputMode: "hidden"|"summary"|"preview" }. Boolean shorthand is also accepted.
_comment_debug: Set to true to append diagnostics to <agent-dir>/extensions/pi-minimal-toolcall/debug/debug.log. No terminal output. Default false.
